title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kia India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kia India
jsonLd.description:
Kia India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
